## Exploration: describe

Found 15 symbols across 2 files.

### Source Code

> The code below is the **verbatim, current on-disk source** of these files — re-read from disk on this call and line-numbered, byte-for-byte identical to what the Read tool returns. It is NOT a summary, outline, or stale cache. Treat each block as a Read you have already performed: do not Read a file shown here.

#### service.rb — describe(function), sound(variable), d(variable), make_dog(function)

```ruby
1	# Service layer exercising require_relative + inferred instance-method calls.
2	
3	require_relative 'models'
4	
5	MAX_DOGS = 10
6	
7	def make_dog(name)
8	  Dog.new(name, "lab")
9	end
10	
11	def describe(name)
12	  d = Dog.new(name, "lab")
13	  sound = d.speak
14	  d.breed
15	  sound
16	end
```

#### models.rb — speak(method), Dog(class), initialize(method), create(method), Animals(module), +4 more

```ruby
1	# Domain models for the rb-small fixture.
2	
3	DEFAULT_SOUND = "..."
4	
5	module Walkable
6	  def walk
7	    "walking"
8	  end
9	end
10	
11	module Animals
12	  class Animal
13	    attr_reader :name
14	
15	    def initialize(name)
16	      @name = name
17	    end
18	
19	    def speak
20	      DEFAULT_SOUND
21	    end
22	  end
23	
24	  class Dog < Animal
25	    include Walkable
26	
27	    attr_accessor :breed
28	
29	    def initialize(name, breed)
30	      super(name)
31	      @breed = breed
32	      @legs = 4
33	    end
34	
35	    def speak
36	      "woof"
37	    end
38	
39	    def self.create(name)
40	      Dog.new(name, "mutt")
41	    end
42	  end
43	end
```
